patterns.name: TODO/FIXME Marker
patterns.recommendation: Resolve or track TODOs before release
patterns.fix_plan: Replace unresolved TODO/FIXME markers with an implemented change or link to a tracked issue ID. If deferred intentionally, add owner + due date and enforce backlog tracking outside release branches.

patterns.name: Explicit Any Type
patterns.description: Explicit any type weakens type safety
patterns.recommendation: Use precise types instead of any
patterns.fix_plan: Replace any with concrete interfaces/types inferred from actual payload shape. Define shared types (for example type UserResponse = {...}) and update call sites to compile with strict type checking.

patterns.name: Console Log
patterns.recommendation: Remove debug logging or use structured logging
patterns.fix_plan: Remove console.debug/info/log from shipped code and route logs through the project's structured logger. Guard temporary debugging behind explicit development flags and add lint rules to block future console logs.

patterns.name: Debugger Statement
patterns.fix_plan: Delete debugger statements from production sources and rely on breakpoints in local debug configs only. Add lint enforcement (no-debugger) to fail CI when debugger is introduced.

patterns.name: Empty Catch Block
patterns.recommendation: Handle or log exceptions instead of empty catch
patterns.fix_plan: Replace empty catch blocks with explicit error handling paths that log context and propagate/translate failures. At minimum capture exception details with request context and return a controlled error response.

patterns.name: Magic Number
patterns.recommendation: Replace magic numbers with named constants
patterns.fix_plan: Extract the literal into a named constant near domain logic and document units. Example: const RETRY_DELAY_MS = 5_000; or const CACHE_TTL_MS = 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000; then reuse constant across call sites.

patterns.name: Long Function
patterns.recommendation: Split long functions into smaller units
patterns.fix_plan: Refactor long functions into focused helpers with single responsibilities and clear inputs/outputs. Keep orchestration in the parent function and move validation, side effects, and mapping into testable private functions.
